    'details': 'A vulnerability classified as problematic was found in '
               'e-Contract dssp up to 1.3.1. Affected by this vulnerability is '
               'the function checkSignResponse of the file '
               'dssp-client/src/main/java/be/e_contract/dssp/client/SignResponseVerifier.java. '
               'The manipulation leads to xml external entity reference. '
               'Upgrading to version 1.3.2 is able to address this issue. The '
               'identifier of the patch is '

               'upgrade the affected component. The identifier VDB-217549 was '
